# Edge Without Madness

Subtitle: `Originality, Constraint, and Bounded Emergence`

## Description / Excerpt

An essay on how originality arises near the edge of constraint, where novelty increases, coherence thins, and reversible stabilizers keep abstraction from running away.

Excerpt:
